title: festuca longifolia subsp. longifolia
intro: Festuca longifolia subsp. longifolia, also known as fescue grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Festuca longifolia subsp. longifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antifungal activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
